finding.summary: The track has no FX chain, healthy dynamics (crest factor 12 dB, LRA 8 LU), reasonable levels, and a typical soft-pad spectral profile. The capture is 38% silence, which dilutes every level statistic and limits confidence.
finding.probable_cause: Evidence does not point to a clear defect. The empty FX chain (fx_chain) means there is no processing to mis-tune. Crest factor and LRA show no excessive compression. The 10.5 dB gap between sample_peak_db and true_peak_db is large but cannot be safely attributed to a specific cause from this payload.
finding.confidence_reason: audio.silence_fraction of 0.38 dilutes all level-based statistics, and there is no actionable evidence of a problem to address on a single track.

evidence_refs.description: 0.38 of the capture is silence, lowering confidence on level-based findings.
12.0 dB, consistent with healthy pad dynamics, not overcompressed.
Empty FX chain - no processing to misconfigure.
-16.0 dB with track volume_db 0.0; reasonable headroom.

proposal.reason: No clear problem is supported by this capture. The FX chain is empty so there is no parameter to set, dynamics are healthy, levels are reasonable, and the 38% silence fraction makes any level-based proposal unreliable.
